reason: Stories dissembled, time fractured, protagonists resurrected in a crime that rewrites itself.
Narrative sleight-of-hand unveils a phantom villain in a mind-bending courtroom lineup.
Dream-logic detours trap a man in a shifting timeline where clues contradict the very evidence.
Alien memories rewrite reality as a lone man battles for truth in a shapeshifting cityscape.
Time travel’s looping paradoxes turn reality into a jigsaw with missing edges.
Bureaucratic nightmares and surrealist riffs collide in a world that mocks its own machinery.
Childhood memories splinter as a boy recounts past trauma in a seamless cycle of shock and déjà vu.
Interwoven vignettes defy chronology, weaving longing and chance in neon-drenched alleys.
A killing spree’s TV coverage splinters time and truth with each grisly flash.
Blurring dreams and duty, a detective hunts ghosts in a rain-soaked city of mirrors.
